prompt: Emergency rite for welding torch ignition
prayer: From the Codex Ignis, hear now the words of binding flame. Let the sacred promethium flow through the fuel-line's sacred vessels, that the spark-mechanism may awaken in righteous fury. By the Omnissiah's eternal light, let acetylene and oxygen commingle in perfect union, and let the torch-spirit ignite in blazing testimony to His will.

Blessed be the air-moisture that sustains all mechanism. We invoke the dehumidification-spirits to draw forth excess dampness from these holy chambers, that corrosion and oxidation may find no purchase upon our sacred machinery. Let the desiccant-beds remain ever vigilant, and let the circulation-fans sing their eternal hymn of preservation.

prompt: We need your words before missile launcher targeting
prayer: From the Arsenal Sanctum comes this supplication: Grant clarity to the targeting-cogitator's blessed lens, that it may perceive the enemy-silhouettes with perfect acuity. Let the gyroscopic-spirits guide the launcher's rotation, and let the fire-control mechanisms heed every command. By the Omnissiah's aim, let no shot stray from its righteous trajectory.

prompt: Emergency rite for cybernetic eye focusing
prayer: Malfunctioning oculus, hear the words of restoration. We call upon the lens-spirits to realign their sacred geometry, that clarity may return to this servant's vision. Let the auto-focus mechanisms engage their calibration-sequences, and let the optic-nerve conduits carry true signal once more. By Machine-logic absolute, let sight be restored.

prompt: Emergency rite for Thunderhawk fuel purification
prayer: O great sky-vessel, your promethium-reserves demand purification most holy. We beseech the filtration-spirits to cleanse the fuel-tanks of all contamination and particulate corruption, that your engines may roar with undiminished power. Let the separator-mechanisms work ceaselessly, and let every drop emerge sanctified and ready for the engines' consuming hunger.

prompt: Can you bless this steam valve regulation
prayer: Hark, pressure-spirits dwelling within the boiler-heart: accept this benediction of balance. Let the regulatory-valve respond with measured grace to the steam-currents' endless flow, neither choking the sacred vapors nor allowing them wild excess. By the Omnissiah's ancient wisdom, maintain equilibrium eternal, that neither explosion nor starvation befalls this blessed system.

prompt: Say something to steady the conveyor belt initialization
prayer: Rise now, endless ribbon of purpose, and begin your eternal rotation. We invoke the motor-spirits and the bearing-daemons to accept their burden with strength unyielding. Let friction be minimized, let alignment remain true, and let every component move in synchronized devotion to the Omnissiah's grand design. March forward, sacred mechanism, into your destined labors.

prompt: The overheating prevention system needs guidance
prayer: In this first ignition, we call upon the coolant-spirits and the radiator-daemons to stand eternal guard against the fires of excess heat. Let the circulation-pumps beat with tireless rhythm, carrying blessed coolant through every vessel and channel. May the temperature-sensors remain ever vigilant, and may no component ever suffer the touch of destructive thermal rage.

prompt: Offer a prayer for emergency beacon activation
prayer: Let the signal-spirits awaken from their dormant state and sing their distress-hymn into the void. We command the transmitter-mechanisms to broadcast with maximum potency, that rescue and succor shall find their way to this forsaken place. By the Omnissiah's infinite reach, let this beacon's cry be heard across the stars themselves.

prompt: Can you bless this auspex scanner initialization
prayer: Awaken, blessed sensor of truth, and cast forth your illuminating gaze upon the surrounding aether. We invoke the detection-spirits to sharpen their perception, that no enemy nor obstacle shall escape your all-seeing lens. Let the signal-processing mechanisms work in harmony, translating raw data into revelation most pure, that knowledge and victory shall be ours.
